career_highlight: 5-time IPL Winning Captain and explosive opening batter.
All-time highest run-getter in tournament history.
Consistently ranks as the world's premier death-overs specialist.
Impact all-rounder with elite finishing capability and mid-overs pace.
World-renowned 360-degree stroke player with exceptional scoring range.
One of the most destructive spin-hitters in global T20 cricket.
World Cup-winning tactical captain and premier new-ball bowler.
Ultra-aggressive left-handed opener known for lightning powerplay starts.
Dynamic dynamic keeper-batter and proven match-winner under high pressure.
Elite middle-overs power hitter with an outstanding boundary-to-ball ratio.
